subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto God Who hath guided us unto His path, Who hath caused us to voice His praise, Who hath sent down unto us the proof, and made manifest unto us [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی هدانا الی صراطه و انطقنا بثنائه و انزل لنا الدلیل و اظهر لنا
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @praise and encouragement, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @wisdom [hikmat], @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
